allow: Bash(docker compose exec postgres psql -U voidsector -c "SELECT id, username, created_at FROM players ORDER BY created_at;")
Bash(docker compose exec postgres psql -U voidsector -c ":*)
Bash(docker compose exec postgres psql -U voidsector -c "\\d players")
Bash(docker compose exec postgres psql -U voidsector -c "\\dt")
Bash(docker compose exec postgres psql -U voidsector -c "\\d ships")
Bash(docker compose exec redis redis-cli KEYS "*Phash*")
Bash(docker compose exec redis redis-cli KEYS "*player*")
Bash(docker compose exec redis redis-cli HGETALL "player:pos:fef0ea7d-76d6-494d-aebf-4e1957277d2d")
Bash(docker compose exec redis redis-cli HSET "player:pos:9f15c2c9-35b2-49ce-8d3e-aa31a6ac76d0" x 1 y 1)
Bash(docker compose exec postgres psql -U voidsector -c "UPDATE players SET home_base = ''{""x"": 1, ""y"": 1}'' WHERE username = ''Smasher'';")
Bash(docker compose exec postgres psql -U voidsector -c "SELECT id, username FROM players;")

Bash(docker compose exec postgres psql -U voidsector -c "UPDATE players SET home_base = ''{""x"": 30000050, ""y"": 30000050}'' WHERE username IN \(''Phash'', ''Smasher'', ''testuser'', ''testpilot''\);")
Bash(do docker compose exec redis redis-cli HSET "player:pos:$id" x 30000050 y 30000050)
